Talon.trading_pattern: Talon has mobility and burst. Keep distance, poke with Q.
Talon.ability_to_dodge: Talon Q — dodge by stepping back.
Talon.early_game: Play safe. Talon has strong early all-in.
Talon.mid_game: Spam Q poke from distance. Maintain range.
Talon.win_condition: Maintain distance and poke from range.
Talon.scaling: Xerath outscales — your range is oppressive late

Katarina.trading_pattern: Katarina has all-in burst. Keep distance, poke with Q.
Katarina.early_game: Play very safe. Katarina has strong all-in.
Katarina.mid_game: Spam Q from distance. Never let her engage.
Katarina.win_condition: Maintain distance and poke from range.
Katarina.scaling: Xerath outscales — your range is oppressive late

Naafiri.trading_pattern: Naafiri has burst. Keep distance, poke with Q.
Naafiri.mid_game: Spam Q from distance. Scale with team.
Naafiri.win_condition: Maintain distance and poke from range.
Naafiri.scaling: Xerath outscales — your range is oppressive late

Fizz.trading_pattern: Fizz is melee with burst. Keep distance, poke with Q.
Fizz.ability_to_dodge: Fizz R — move away from shark.
Fizz.early_game: Play very safe. Fizz has strong all-in.
Fizz.mid_game: Spam Q from distance. Scale with team.
Fizz.win_condition: Maintain distance and poke from range.
Fizz.scaling: Xerath outscales — your range is oppressive late

Kassadin.trading_pattern: Kassadin weak early. Spam Q poke and control lane.
Kassadin.ability_to_dodge: Kassadin Q — dodge by stepping back.
Kassadin.early_game: Dominate with Q spam. Control lane completely.
Kassadin.mid_game: Maintain Q poke. Deny his roaming.
Kassadin.late_game: He outscales. Finish before he scales.
Kassadin.win_condition: Get early advantage. Finish before Kassadin scales.
Kassadin.scaling: Kassadin outscales — you need major early lead

Ahri.trading_pattern: Ahri has poke and mobility. Trade when Q down.
Ahri.ability_to_dodge: Ahri Q — dodge by stepping sideways.
Ahri.early_game: Play defensively. Ahri has decent poke.
Ahri.win_condition: Maintain distance and poke from range.
Ahri.scaling: Xerath outscales — your range beats her mobility late

Vel'Koz.trading_pattern: Vel'Koz similar range. Trade when abilities down.
Vel'Koz.ability_to_dodge: Vel'Koz E — dodge by stepping away.
Vel'Koz.early_game: Mirror his playstyle. Both have range.
Vel'Koz.scaling: Xerath slightly favored — your sustained poke is stronger late

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder very weak. Spam Q poke and farm.
Smolder.early_game: Dominate with Q spam. Control lane.
Smolder.win_condition: Get early advantage. Finish before he scales.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need major lead

Cassiopeia.trading_pattern: Cassio has sustained poke. Trade when W down.
Cassiopeia.win_condition: Maintain distance and poke from range.
Cassiopeia.scaling: Xerath slightly favored — your range beats her sustain late
Cassiopeia.positioning: Keep distance. Spam Q. Avoid poison.

Orianna.trading_pattern: Orianna has similar range. Trade when ball far.
Orianna.ability_to_dodge: Orianna Q — dodge by stepping back.
Orianna.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both have range.
Orianna.scaling: Even — both are strong late-game mages
Orianna.positioning: Keep distance. Stay away from ball.

Zed.trading_pattern: Zed has burst and mobility. Keep distance, poke with Q.
Zed.ability_to_dodge: Zed W — back off when he clones.
Zed.early_game: Play safe. Zed has strong early burst.
Zed.mid_game: Spam Q from range. Never let him engage.
Zed.win_condition: Maintain distance and poke from range.
Zed.scaling: Xerath outscales — your range beats his burst late

Lux.trading_pattern: Lux has similar range and poke. Trade when E down.
Lux.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both have range.
Lux.scaling: Even — both are strong late-game mages

Syndra.trading_pattern: Syndra has burst and range. Trade when Q down.
Syndra.ability_to_dodge: Syndra E — dodge by moving away.
Syndra.win_condition: Maintain distance and poke from range.
Syndra.scaling: Xerath slightly favored — your sustained poke beats her burst late

Ryze.trading_pattern: Ryze has similar range and kiting. Trade when Q down.
Ryze.scaling: Xerath slightly favored — your range is more consistent late

Malzahar.trading_pattern: Malzahar has sustain and suppress. Trade when E down.
Malzahar.mid_game: Spam Q poke. Avoid his suppress.
Malzahar.win_condition: Maintain distance and poke from range.
Malzahar.scaling: Xerath favored — your range beats his sustain late

Viktor.trading_pattern: Viktor has poke with E. Trade when cooldown down.
Viktor.scaling: Xerath slightly favored — your range beats his poke late

Veigar.trading_pattern: Veigar weak early. Spam Q and deny stacks.
Veigar.early_game: Dominate with Q spam. Deny his stacking.
Veigar.mid_game: Maintain Q poke. Don't get caged.
Veigar.win_condition: Get early advantage. Finish before he stacks.
Veigar.scaling: Veigar outscales — stacking makes him oppressive late

Anivia.trading_pattern: Anivia has range and CC. Trade when Q down.
Anivia.ability_to_dodge: Anivia Q — dodge by moving sideways.
Anivia.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both have range.
Anivia.scaling: Even — both are strong late-game mages

Seraphine.trading_pattern: Seraphine has similar poke. Trade when Q down.
Seraphine.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both have range.
Seraphine.scaling: Even — both are strong late-game mages

Ekko.trading_pattern: Ekko is mobile. Keep distance, poke with Q.
Ekko.mid_game: Spam Q poke. Scale with team.
Ekko.win_condition: Maintain distance and poke from range.
Ekko.scaling: Xerath slightly favored — your range beats his mobility late
